message:
test(term): cold scrollback convergence test + cfg(test) guards for reflow worker accessors

test/mod.rs (+86 lines):
- Add \`test_resize_cold_scrollback_converges_and_bounds_line_growth\`:
  exercises 8-step resize sequence (cols 4→11→5→10→6→9→7→8) with
  alternating DPI (96/144) over 160 lines of content, then verifies:
  - Line count stays within soft growth bound (4× visible+scrollback)
  - Steady-state resize to same dimensions does not keep growing
  - Viewport converges: two consecutive same-size resizes produce
    identical visible line snapshots (no drift)

screen.rs (+4 lines):
- Add \`#[cfg(test)]\` to \`backlog_depth()\`, \`completed_lines_total()\`,
  \`completed_batches_total()\`, and \`active_intent()\` methods on
  ColdScrollbackReflowWorker to suppress dead-code warnings in
  release builds while keeping them accessible for test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
